description_long: This object is a slender, dark-colored screwdriver with a cylindrical handle and a long, straight shaft. The handle appears to be slightly flared at the top, providing a modest grip, and is made from a material with a matte finish. The shaft is thin and extends directly from the center of the handle, maintaining a consistent diameter along its length. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The tip of the screwdriver is not clearly visible, making it difficult to determine the exact type. The surface of the object appears clean and free from any visible wear or damage.
description: A dark, cylindrical-handled screwdriver with a long, straight shaft and a matte finish, showing no visible wear or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical handle and the straight shaft extending upward, with the handle's slight flare visible.
description_view_1: Side view similar to the front, with the handle's shape and shaft alignment unchanged, no additional features visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same handle and shaft proportions visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the cylindrical handle and straight shaft, with no distinguishing marks.
attribute_handle_type: straight, cylindrical, plastic, matte finish, slightly flared at the top
